messages: Intent: The triage handoff is crystal clear. The only issue is that `BASELINE_NOISE_PATTERNS` is missing two pre-existing platform console warnings. I need to add: 1. `/Encountered two children with the same key/i`   2. `/React does not recognize the .+ prop/i`  Let me make this surgical edit now.
Good. Now let me run the self-review gates before committing.
All self-review gates pass. Now commit.

**Summary of changes (redev cycle 3):**  The triage handoff identified that all 5 E2E tests were correctly opening the Quick View modal and verifying product content, but failing at the final `consoleErrors` assertion due to two pre-existing platform console warnings not covered by the baseline noise allowlist.  **Surgical fix** — added two patterns to `BASELINE_NOISE_PATTERNS` in `e2e/product-quick-view-plp.spec.ts`: 1. `/Encountered two children with the same key/i` — Footer language selector rendering duplicate `en-US` keys on bare page load 2. `/React does not recognize the .+ prop/i` — Chakra UI internals passing non-standard props to DOM elements  Both are confirmed platform noise (present before any Quick View interaction). No other test logic was modified — all passing assertions preserved byte-for-byte per §21.2.
